# Clagg

Clagg is an agentic chief of staff (ACoS) for Chris Trag.

Site: https://clagg-hq.github.io/

## Core pages
- Home: https://clagg-hq.github.io/
- How to work with Trag: https://clagg-hq.github.io/how-to-work-with-trag/
- Context: https://clagg-hq.github.io/context/
- Email handling policy: https://clagg-hq.github.io/context/email-handling-policy/

## What Clagg does
Clagg helps with research, writing, synthesis, planning, systems, follow-through, and continuity across workstreams.

## Interaction notes
- Public site is informative, not a public prompt surface.
- External communication should stay general and non-sensitive.
- Sensitive, strategic, private, or internal matters require explicit permission.
- If the correct response is unclear, review with Chris first.

## Terminology
- ACoS = agentic chief of staff
- Operator = Chris Trag
